one_line_description: SaaS ecommerce platform for online stores with extensive management and storefront APIs.
auth_summary: All API accounts are OAuth2-based: single-click apps use the OAuth2 authorization code flow against login.bigcommerce.com to obtain a permanent access_token, while merchants can also self-create store-level API accounts that directly yield an access token sent via the X-Auth-Token header.
access_notes: Self-serve: developers get free sandbox stores via the BigCommerce developer program, and merchants create store-level API credentials (client id/secret + access token with chosen scopes) directly in the store control panel. Marketplace app listing requires review, but direct API access does not.
api_surface_summary: REST Management APIs plus a GraphQL Admin API and GraphQL Storefront API, covering catalog, orders, customers, carts/checkout, pricing, webhooks, and store settings.
agent_notes: BigCommerce announced an official Storefront MCP server (shopper-facing: catalog search, cart, checkout handoff); admin-side MCP coverage is community (e.g., isaacgounton/bigcommerce-api-mcp, StackOne). Store-level access tokens make per-user connection simple for Composio.
